findings.detail: Top-bottom tier stack reads as the risk pyramid: red highlighted Prohibited tier at the narrow top, amber Article 5 ban list, lavender narrow-exceptions sub-note, green High-risk 'allowed under rules' tier at bottom. Banned-outright vs allowed-under-rules contrast is unmistakable. All labels trace to corpus Core Concepts; no overlaps, truncation, or concept drift.

history.finding: subtitle font-size inconsistency in BANS node — last span block rendered larger than the lines above it, making the bottom bans read as more important than the headline bans.

consolidated ban list into a single uniform 12px span with internal
breaks; all six lines now render at equal size.
